---
title: Circadian patterns
authors:
  - name: Martin Laptev
    affiliation: CCBC
    roles: writing
    corresponding: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Circadian rhyhms 

Write some text.

And maybe put in a citation: [@Rosenwasser2015].

This is a simple placeholder for the manuscript's main document [@knuth84].

Put in an image:

![](images/clipboard-1031476596.png)

![](images/clipboard-3115331740.png)
